Session 4 - extra worksheet

  • Dataset
  • Final plot
  • Hints

This worksheet’s dataset is the January 2024 update downloaded from Open Data Scotland.

↓ Click the link below to download the dataset for this worksheet to your hard drive.

practice_contactdetails_jan2024-open-data.csv

You’ll need the readr, dplyr, and ggplot2 packages.

You will have to filter the data before you plot it.
